ValidationRule.description: Specifies the date when the training is planned to occur; must be a future date if the stage is Scheduled
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL(Training_Stage__c, "Scheduled"), OR( ISBLANK(Training_Scheduled_Date__c), DATEVALUE(Training_Scheduled_Date__c) < TODAY() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Training Scheduled Date must be a future date and cannot be blank when Training Stage is Scheduled
